languages.original_text: "I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."

languages.text: "Я не намерен продолжать. Забирай Себериана фон Валанциуса. Местный Музеон пал, и я не вижу причин и далее находиться здесь".
"I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."
languages.original_text: "Я не намерен продолжать. Забирай Себериана фон Валанциуса. Местный Музеон пал, и я не вижу причин и далее находиться здесь".

traits.locale_text: "I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."
"I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."
"I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."

languages.text: «No tengo ninguna intención de continuar. Llévate a Seberian von Valancius. Esta parte del Museion ha caído, y no veo motivo alguno para seguir aquí».
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."

traits.locale_text: «No tengo ninguna intención de continuar. Llévate a Seberian von Valancius. Esta parte del Museion ha caído, y no veo motivo alguno para seguir aquí».

languages.text: “我也不想继续了。把塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯带走吧。这一部分的陈列馆已经沦陷，我看不出留在这里还有什么意义。”
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."

traits.locale_text: “我也不想继续了。把塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯带走吧。这一部分的陈列馆已经沦陷，我看不出留在这里还有什么意义。”

languages.text: « Je n'ai nullement l'intention de continuer. Emmenez Seberian von Valancius. Maintenant que vous avez détruit cette partie du Muséion, je ne vois aucune raison de rester. »
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai nullement l'intention de continuer. Emmenez Seberian von Valancius. Maintenant que vous avez détruit cette partie du Muséion, je ne vois aucune raison de rester. »

languages.text: "Devam etmeye niyetim yok. Seberian von Valancius'u al götür. Museion'un bu kısmı kaybedildi. Burada kalmak için bir neden göremiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."

traits.locale_text: "Devam etmeye niyetim yok. Seberian von Valancius'u al götür. Museion'un bu kısmı kaybedildi. Burada kalmak için bir neden göremiyorum."

languages.text: "Ich habe nicht vor, weiterzumachen. Nimm Seberian von Valancius mit. Dieser Teil des Museions ist gefallen, und ich sehe keinen Grund, zu bleiben."
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe nicht vor, weiterzumachen. Nimm Seberian von Valancius mit. Dieser Teil des Museions ist gefallen, und ich sehe keinen Grund, zu bleiben."

languages.text: 「私は続けるつもりはありません。シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスを連れて行ってください。この部分は崩壊しました。ここに残る理由は何もありません。」
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of continuing. Take Seberian von Valancius away. This part of the Museion has fallen, and I see no reason to remain here."

traits.locale_text: 「私は続けるつもりはありません。シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスを連れて行ってください。この部分は崩壊しました。ここに残る理由は何もありません。」
